introSection: The Great Alonzo's Cannonball Coaster was a kiddie roller coaster built by US manufacturer Molina & Son's previously located at Adventure World in Upper Marlboro, Maryland, USA.
fullText:
The Great Alonzo's Cannonball Coaster was a kiddie roller coaster built by US manufacturer Molina & Son's previously located at Adventure World in Upper Marlboro, Maryland, USA.



Black track and supports.
